violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed using tobacco outside of designated area. Employees smoking in back room with food and dishes storage. No longer a designated area due to possible contamination.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Tubes of raw ground beef and bags of raw whole meats were stored over cooked eggs, buns, potatoes, and lettuce in the walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cooked baked potatoes were being stored in a cardboard box in the walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system over the cooking equipment in the main cooking area needs to be cleaned.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A bag of onions was stored on the floor in the back room.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the back hand sink in the prep area was not working.
